name: Image Loader
desc:
I created this Image Loader to gain a deeper understanding of how image files work and to utilize it for loading images in my own 3D Game Engine. To do this, I wrote this C++ header from scratch without relying on external dependencies to decode PNG, JPG, BMP, and QOI images into a 2D array. For example, I implemented the zlib decoding for PNG data myself.

By including the header in C++, this image loader can load most PNG, JPEG, and BMP images by inputting the file path.

To demonstrate, I created a demo program in Windows. After running it, you can open any image by clicking File->Open.

name: 3D Game Engine
desc:
The purpose of this project is to learn OpenGL and Game Engine development. With the help of LearnOpenGL, I have independently developed most of the features. The only external libraries I utilized are GLFW and GLAD for the basic building blocks of OpenGL, MikkTSpace for Tangent Space, and FreeType for Font Loading.

With this project, anyone can create a custom Game Engine by inheriting the Base Game Engine Class. The Game Engine works with entities, which can have additional component objects added to run additional functions such as movement.

I have utilized my ImageLoader for loading images. Additionally, I have developed a custom GLTF loader to load models, including animations and morphs. To play the loaded animations, you can use the animation Component.

This engine renders 3D models in Phong shading. This engine also implements Weighted Blended Order-Independent Transparency for both partial and full transparency rendering. For lighting, there are static lights such as directional lights, as well as dynamic lights like point lights and spot lights.

To demonstrate this project, I have created a demo that you can download and experiment with.

name: Wizard and Dungeon
desc:
In this game, you play as a wizard who is stuck in a dungeon. Your task is to defeat an evil wizard who has trapped you. You can use your knowledge of magic to create unique spells to defeat the minions summoned by the evil wizard.

You can find or purchase spell components from item chests or shops. With spell components, you can create various spells. Every spell requires a transport component and a target component. The transport component determines the spell's type, such as projectile or ray. The target component determines how the spell will behave, such as targeting the mouse pointer or targeting enemies. Using the Triggering component, you can trigger the next spell on trigger events, such as on hit.

There are five levels, and each level has a boss. Defeating the boss opens a stairway to the next level and gives you three character upgrade options to choose from. You can choose one of the three options to permanently upgrade one aspect of your character.

name: Mage Adventure
desc:
In this game, you play the role of a mage who is tasked with defeating the Lich that resides within a dungeon. However, the Lich has summoned minions to protect the dungeon. Therefore, you must use your spells to overcome any enemies that you encounter.

As a mage, you possess a variety of spells that you can cast. These spells are unique and have different trigger events. For instance, some spells will trigger the next spell when you hit a wall, while others may trigger the next spell when you defeat an enemy. By chaining spells together through these triggers, you can create powerful and devastating combos that will help you defeat any enemies you face.

You can level up and gain experience by defeating enemies. Every five levels, you can learn or upgrade a spell. Additionally, with each level increase, you can improve your attributes such as health or power.

I used this project to test out the Wave Function Collapse Algorithm for Eden8080. Also, I used this project to implement the spell trigger chaining mechanic.

name: Shop of Creativity
features: 3 Unique sets of Enemy and Boss
desc: Step into the shoes of a young wizard apprentice, fueled by the dream of one day becoming a Supreme Grand Master. To earn the coins needed for your exam, you open a shop brimming with exotic wonders. As a budding wizard, you can craft and personalize spells using a variety of magical components. With six distinct spell types, each offering its own flair, you can even chain spells together if you include a trigger component. Managing your shop means paying weekly rent, or risk facing Game Over. To attract more customers, you can transform your shop with unique furniture. Seek out rare items by braving mysterious dungeons or crafting them with your own hands.

name: Eden8080
desc: Step into the metallic shoes of a vengeful robot, determined to wipe out anything that dares to block your path. Arm yourself with up to four customizable guns, each one a surprise thanks to randomly generated parts and projectiles. With 86 weapon modifications to discover, you can craft the perfect arsenal to match your unique approach. Face off against more than 40 distinct enemies and formidable bosses as you dive into ever-changing levels, ensuring every run is a fresh and thrilling challenge.

name: Web 3D Renderer
desc:
I created this project while learning how to use the Canvas API. I also wrote my own math library in JavaScript for vectors, matrices, and quaternions to handle 3D rendering. The renderer supports flat shading with direct lighting and clips polygons outside the view to make rendering faster. It sorts polygons by depth using the Painter's algorithm. Since triangles are the smallest unit it draws, sometimes polygons can overlap in unexpected ways. If you add the script to your page's head, you can use this renderer to make your own 3D animations or games.

To demonstrate its capabilities, I created a two-player game demo. In this game, your goal is to be the first to catch 10 frogs and bring them to the green zone. If you get hit by a frog from behind, you lose.

name: Gold Rush
desc:
Team up with three friends in a thrilling co-op shooter, defending your precious gold bars against endless waves of enemies. Coordinate your strategy through text, voice, or expressive gestures. Every fallen enemy leaves behind scrap, the essential resource for forging powerful new weapons or upgrading your arsenal. After each electrifying round, select from a trove of weapon modifications as your prize. The more scrap you collect, the richer your rewards. Each weapon can be enhanced with up to four modifications.

Back at your base, a variety of machines await, ready to help you upgrade, duplicate, deconstruct, reconstruct, or trade your modifications using scrap. Upgrading the modification to the max level will unlock its special ability. You can also infuse your weapons with gold, unlocking a special ability for each one.
